properties.name: openflags.provider
properties.description: The flag provider type to use. Supported: 'file', 'remote', 'hybrid'.

properties.name: openflags.file.path
properties.description: Path to the flag definition file. Supports classpath: and file: prefixes.

properties.name: openflags.file.watch-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable hot reload when the flag file changes. Automatically disabled for files inside JARs.

properties.name: openflags.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Enable Micrometer metrics. Requires micrometer-core in classpath and a MeterRegistry bean.

properties.name: openflags.metrics.tag-flag-key
properties.description: If true, the 'flag' tag is added to per-flag counters and timers. Disable to reduce cardinality when N > 200 flags.

properties.name: openflags.metrics.tags
properties.description: Static tags applied to all openflags metrics.

properties.name: openflags.audit.mdc-enabled
properties.description: If true, sets 'openflags.flag_key' and 'openflags.targeting_key' in SLF4J MDC during evaluation. WARNING: targeting key may contain PII.

properties.name: openflags.remote.failure-threshold
properties.description: Consecutive remote poll failures before exponential backoff kicks in.

properties.name: openflags.remote.max-backoff
properties.description: Upper bound for the backoff delay applied when the circuit is open.
